question: Based on the image, which of the following would be the best way for an artist to represent the scene in a painting? Select from the following options: (A) Focus on the animals grazing while including trees and the fence in the background. (B) A landscape composition with a large farm building as the focal point. (C) A close-up of a group of trees with a few animals grazing nearby. (D) A panoramic view of the field, with animals and trees as minor details.
gold_answer: A panoramic view of the field, with animals and trees as minor details
answer_choices: Focus on the animals grazing while including trees and the fence in the background
A landscape composition with a large farm building as the focal point
A close-up of a group of trees with a few animals grazing nearby
A panoramic view of the field, with animals and trees as minor details

qwen_prompt_object.inpaint_prompt: Close-up of grazing horses with detailed fur and expressive eyes, surrounded by lush green grass
qwen_prompt_object.negative_prompt: Panoramic view, distant trees, farm buildings, wide field, minor details

inpaint_prompt_used: Close-up of grazing horses with detailed fur and expressive eyes, surrounded by lush green grass
negative_prompt_used: Panoramic view, distant trees, farm buildings, wide field, minor details
